name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exits one and reports fidelity_audit=dirty when a spec uses a key not in the architecture vocabulary
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf '%s\n' '## Phase F' '- **F-4** Drift-detection skill.' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"echo wibblewobble: yes","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'fidelity_audit=dirty' out.txt && grep -q 'unknown_vocab=wibblewobble' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
